root_text.an5.120:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgatā bhikkhunī yathābhataṁ nikkhittā evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.120:1.8: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgatā bhikkhunī yathābhataṁ nikkhittā evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.120:2.1: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgatā bhikkhunī yathābhataṁ nikkhittā evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an5.120:2.8: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgatā bhikkhunī yathābhataṁ nikkhittā evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an5.120:1.1: “Mendicants, a nun with five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.120:1.3: Without examining or scrutinizing, she praises those deserving of criticism,
translation_text.an5.120:1.4: and criticizes those deserving of praise.
translation_text.an5.120:1.7: and wastes gifts given in faith.
translation_text.an5.120:1.8: A nun with these five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.120:2.1: A nun with five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.120:2.3: After examining and scrutinizing, she criticizes those deserving of criticism,
translation_text.an5.120:2.4: and praises those deserving of praise.
translation_text.an5.120:2.7: and doesn’t waste gifts given in faith.
translation_text.an5.120:2.8: A nun with these five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”

reference_text.an5.120:1.1: bj20.230, csp1ed16.125, csp2ed16.125, ms16A5_694, msdiv120, pts-vp-pli3.142
